_about: Canonical, controlled facet vocabulary for the difficulty auto-tuning system. SOURCE OF TRUTH: the add-to-backlog authoring step picks facet values ONLY from this file; the calibration/policy validate against it; a human curates it (deliberate additions only, never ad-hoc per task). Facets are the join key that lets the policy generalise escalation history from past tasks to new ones. needs-human (gated) tasks are CARVED OUT entirely — they never run through the loop, so they get no facets and never enter calibration.

layer.desc: WHERE the change lives — inferable largely from the task's scope file paths.

work-type.desc: WHAT KIND of change it is — the main thing the authoring LLM reasons about.

risk.desc: Danger modifiers; each pushes difficulty UP. Used by the policy only once a cell is dense.

touches-schema.desc: scope includes src/db/schema.sql or src/db/index.ts (the T098 trap)

touches-executor.desc: scope includes core/executor, workflow-executor, dag, or scheduler

full-stack.desc: spans db + api + dashboard in one task
